strap: Cardiff Capital Region Med Tech draws £935m of UKRI lead-led funding across 892 grants, anchored by Cardiff University (60%), Cardiff And Vale University Health Board (3%), with Office For National Statistics on the industrial side. 9 Companies House-traced spin-outs translate to £104m UKRI per spin-out.
behaviour: The cluster shows high-confidence "Re-proving instead of narrowing" and "Stabilising around incumbents" behaviour — repeated infrastructure commitments reinforce incumbent positions rather than redirecting capability toward new anchors or sub-domain specialisms.
